final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original marketing poster for the brand RAN QIU, evoking warm autumnal poetry and Eastern minimalist aesthetics.

Style/medium: flat editorial poster with Eastern minimalist sensibility, generous negative space, inspired by Japanese wabi-sabi and Chinese ink-wash restraint
Composition: centered vertical layout with ample white space, shallow depth of field implied through soft background blur, golden-hour warmth permeating the frame
Subject: brand identity "RAN QIU" as the visual anchor, surrounded by sparse natural elements — dried botanicals, fallen leaves, or a single branch — arranged with deliberate negative space
Scene/backdrop: clean, near-white or warm mist background suggesting an open autumnal landscape, no busy detail
Lighting/mood: soft diffused golden-hour light, warm and healing, gentle shadows, tranquil and poetic atmosphere
Color palette: #8B3A1E (deep autumn rust-red) as the dominant accent, #E8DCCB (warm beige) as the base ground, #D4A574 (golden tan) as the mid-tone bridge — colors applied sparingly to reinforce warmth without saturation overload
Text (verbatim): "RAN QIU"
Constraints: brand mark "RAN QIU" must be legible and prominent; color palette strictly limited to #8B3A1E, #E8DCCB, #D4A574 plus near-white; negative space must occupy at least 40% of the frame
Avoid: busy backgrounds, cold or blue tones, neon, gradients, over-ornamentation, Western maximalist poster layouts, generic Behance flat design clichés
